items.headline: Three UN peacekeepers killed in southern Lebanon
items.body: Indonesian peacekeepers died after projectiles hit UN positions amid intensifying Israel-Hezbollah exchanges. France requested emergency Security Council meeting following the deaths.

items.headline: Israel enacts death penalty for Palestinians convicted of killing Israelis
items.body: Parliament approved legislation allowing capital punishment for Palestinians found guilty of such attacks. Rights groups condemned the law as violation of international legal protections.

items.headline: Federal judge freezes US childhood vaccine guidance changes
items.body: Court ordered halt to all immunization schedule alterations made since June 2025 pending review. Medical organizations questioned decision-making process behind changes to longstanding vaccination protocols.
